text.title: CI Quality Gate Design Decision Tree
text.summary: Routes each check to BLOCK/WARN/NIGHTLY and validates the budget at the design level. Branches name observable check + budget features.

decision-tree.root-question: Are prerequisites satisfied: CI config, check inventory, 30-day data, budget target?

branch.question: For each check: is signal-strength HIGH (failures are real bugs, low FP) AND runtime ≤ 10 min?
Is runtime > 10 min OR exploratory check (mutation / fuzz / perf)?
Does every BLOCK check have rationale + owner_email + escalation?

text.example: prereqs_met=true → all checks classified → block_critical_path=6.8 ≤ 10 → all BLOCK rationale present → verdict=commit-design (ref run-the-checklist).
